title: Senior Full-Stack Engineer
summary: Build production-grade web applications across the stack — React on the front, Node/Python on the back, deployed on modern cloud infrastructure.
responsibilities: Design and ship features end-to-end across the stack
Collaborate with product and design on technical architecture
Mentor junior engineers and review pull requests
Participate in on-call rotation for critical systems
requirements: 5+ years of professional software development experience
Strong proficiency with JavaScript/TypeScript, React, and Node.js
Experience with relational and document databases (PostgreSQL, MongoDB)
Hands-on experience with AWS, Azure, or GCP
